INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAREFUL_PLANNING.title: Careful Planning
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAREFUL_PLANNING.descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When discarded, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] that gain [gold]Block[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [blue]{Nimble:diff()}[/blue].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STRIKE_TRUE.title: Strike True
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STRIKE_TRUE.descriptio:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
When discarded, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [blue]{Sharp:diff()}[/blue].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHARP_WIT.title: Sharp Wit
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHARP_WIT.description:
Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHARP_WIT.selectionScr: Choose cards to put on top of your Draw Pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMBUSH.title: Ambush
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMBUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever an adjacent card is discarded, increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BORROWED_NOTES.title: Borrowed Notes
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BORROWED_NOTES.descrip: Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}Attack and Skill from a different class, and a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHT_TRAINING.title: Weight Training
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHT_TRAINING.descri: Whenever you discard a card, gain {WeightTrainingPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHARE_THE_LOAD.title: Share the Load
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHARE_THE_LOAD.descrip: Whenever any player [gold]Exhausts[/gold] a card, all players gain {ShareTheLoadPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VIPER_FORM.title: Viper Form
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VIPER_FORM.description: The first {ViperFormPower:diff()} times you play your rightmost card each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TIP_THE_SCALES.title: Tip the Scales
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TIP_THE_SCALES.descrip:
[gold]Weights[/gold] are treated as having {TipTheScalesPower:diff()} more cost than they have.
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STALK_PREY.title: Stalk Prey
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-THROWING_WEIGHT.title: Throwing Weight
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-THROWING_WEIGHT.descri: When you discard a [gold]Weight[/gold], deal {ThrowingWeightPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SEEK.title: Seek
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SEEK.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add {Cards:plural:it|them} to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SEEK.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to add to your hand.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VULPINE_FORM.title: Vulpine Form
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_WARD.title: Blade Ward
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_WARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
When discarded, add a [gold]Ward[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HUNT_FOR_COVER.title: Hunt for Cover
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WARD.title: Ward
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MASTERMIND.title: Mastermind
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MASTERMIND.description:
[gold]Devious[/gold].
Choose a card in your [gold]Draw[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUICK_ESCAPE.title: Quick Escape
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUICK_ESCAPE.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have discarded a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALIBRATED_RESPONSE.de:
[gold]Devious[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Block is not removed at the start of your next turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NEUTRALIZE.title: Neutralize
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CHOKING_HAZARD.title: Choking Hazard
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CHOKING_HAZARD.descrip:
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VIPERS_KISS.title: Viper's Kiss
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAROM.title: Carom
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CAROM.description:
[gold]Devious[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NIMBLENESS.title: Nimbleness
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NIMBLENESS.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHTED_STRIKE.title: Weighted Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHTED_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold], plus {CalculationBase:diff()}.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEEP_CUT.title: Deep Cut
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HEAVY_HANDED.title: Heavy Handed
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HEAVY_HANDED.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each Status in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLAY.title: Flay
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the enemy has:
[gold]Weak[/gold] - Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Bleed[/gold] - Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Both - [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOOD_CATALYST.title: Blood Catalyst
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODTAP.title: Bloodtap
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODTAP.description:
Gain {InstinctPower:diff()} [gold]Instinct[/gold].
At the start of your turn, apply {BloodtapPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAMPIRE.title: Vampire
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAMPIRE.description:
[gold]Devious[/gold].
Remove a [gold]Bleed[/gold] from the target to heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VANTOMANCY.title: Vantomancy
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SNAP_STRIKE.title: Snap Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SNAP_STRIKE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 2 [gold]Shivs[/gold] and a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SURPRISE_SHIVS.title: Surprise Shivs
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SURPRISE_SHIVS.descrip:
[gold]Devious[/gold].
Add {Shivs:diff()} [gold]Shivs[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Your [gold]Shivs[/gold] deal {AccuracyPower:diff()} more damage this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PLUME.title: Plume
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NEGOTIATE.title: Negotiate
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ENCORE.title: Encore
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ENCORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When discarded, reduce its cost by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for the combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SNEAKY_STRIKE.title: Sneaky Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SNEAKY_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have discarded a card this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LITTLE_ARROWS.title: Little Arrows
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LITTLE_ARROWS.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Status in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SANGUINE_SCRYING.title: Sanguine Scrying
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SANGUINE_SCRYING.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target is [gold]Weak[/gold], gain {InstinctPower:diff()} [gold]Instinct[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PREPARE.title: Prepare
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHANK_AND_FLANK.title: Shank and Flank
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHANK_AND_FLANK.descri: At the start of each turn, add a [gold]Shiv[/gold] and a [gold]Ward[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHOW_OFF.title: Show Off
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHOW_OFF.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
}After you play your first Attack each turn, draw a card
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_OF_IRE.title: Blade of Ire
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_OF_IRE.descripti:
Whenever you play an Attack, gain {BladeOfIrePower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Strength[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BELLOWTRAUMA.title: Bellowtrauma
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BELLOWTRAUMA.descripti:
Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
If already [gold]Bleeding[/gold], also apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FAREWELL.title: Farewell
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FAREWELL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have discarded a card this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SUBTERFUGE.title: Subterfuge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SUBTERFUGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SUBTERFUGE.selectionSc: Choose cards to return to your hand.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HEAVY_SHIELD.title: Heavy Shield
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_CYCLONE.title: Blade Cyclone
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLADE_CYCLONE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your draw pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODWAVE.title: Bloodwave
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODWAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.{Repeat:cond:>0?
Repeat {Repeat:diff()} times|}.
Repeat this an additional time whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MAKING_CHANGE.title: Making Change
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ADVANTAGE.title: Advantage
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ADVANTAGE.description:
Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Status this turn, gain {AdvantageBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLUBBER_FLING.title: Flubber Fling
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLUBBER_FLING.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [gold]Slimed[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PLUNDER.title: Plunder
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PLUNDER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw cards until you draw a non-Skill card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNLOAD.title: Unload
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNLOAD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard all non-Attack cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CHEAP_SHOT.title: Cheap Shot
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CHEAP_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add a [gold]Weight[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MEASURED_DEFENSE.title: Measured Defense
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LACERATE.title: Lacerate
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HUNTERS_PROWESS.title: Hunter's Prowess
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALM_NERVES.title: Calm Nerves
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALM_NERVES.descriptio:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
When discarded, increase these values by 1 and return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MASS_APPEAL.title: Mass Appeal
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MASS_APPEAL.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHT.title: Weight
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WEIGHT.description: At the end of your turn, increase this card's cost by 1 (up to 3).
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DECAY.title: Decay
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INVOKE.title: Invoke
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INVOKE.description: Trigger the passive effects of your Orbs.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-POKE.title: Poke
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COSMIC_WAVE.title: Cosmic Wave
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LANCING_BOLT.title: Lancing Bolt
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BRAINSHOCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BRAINSHOCK.title: Brainshock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIP_AND_TEAR.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy 3 times.
Discard a card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIP_AND_TEAR.title: Rip and Tear
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DARK_BOOST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DARK_BOOST.title: Dark Boost
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FORGE.title: Forge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PHASIC_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Trigger the passive ability of your rightmost Orb {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PHASIC_STRIKE.title: Phasic Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-END_OF_CREATION.title: End of Creation
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-EVENTIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-EVENTIDE.title: Eventide
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INFECTED_SHOT.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you Exhaust a Void, the target loses {PowerAmount:diff()} HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INFECTED_SHOT.title: Infected Shot
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLARION_STRIKE.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you draw a Void, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLARION_STRIKE.title: ClarionStrike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ROD_OF_RUIN.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
At the start of your next 2 turns, [gold]channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ROD_OF_RUIN.title: RodOfRuin
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GAZE.title: Gaze
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WRECK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each Orb you have.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WRECK.title: Wreck
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNHOLY_STRENGTH.title: UnholyStrength
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-KNIFES_EDGE.descriptio:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} Strength.
Add 2 [gold]Voids[/gold] to your discard pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-KNIFES_EDGE.title: Knife's Edge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PEER.title: Peer
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WHITE_HOLE.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Plasma[/gold].
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] to the top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WHITE_HOLE.title: White Hole
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GIGABEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Put a [gold]Void[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GIGABEAM.title: Gigabeam
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MULTI_CALL.description: Trigger the passive abilities of your Orbs {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} {IfUpgraded:show:times|time}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MULTI_CALL.title: Multi-call
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CRITICAL_MASS.descript: If you have no [gold]Energy[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CRITICAL_MASS.title: Critical Mass
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PAINBOW.title: Painbow
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COLLAPSE.title: Collapse
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COLD_FRONT.title: Cold Front
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COLD_FRONT.description:
Discard up to {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold] for each discarded.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ONYX_DRILL.title: Onyx Drill
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ONYX_DRILL.description:
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Void[/gold] you have.
(Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage total.)
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_STRIKE.title: Shadow Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SHADOW_STRIKE.descript:
Discard any number of cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLIGHTSTORM.title: Blightstorm
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLIGHTSTORM.descriptio: Trigger the [gold]Evoke[/gold] effects of your Orbs without losing them.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-THE_LAW.title: The Law
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-THE_LAW.description:
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Claw+|Claw}[/gold] to your hand.
Increase this number by 1 permanently.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SLUDGE_BOMB.title: Sludge Bomb
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SLUDGE_BOMB.descriptio: If you have a [gold]Void[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], spend it and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ALTAR.title: Altar
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ALTAR.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If it was a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GLOOMGUARD.title: Gloomguard
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GLOOMGUARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Costs 0 if a [gold]Void[/gold] is in hand.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COLD_WINDS.title: Cold Winds
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COLD_WINDS.description:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all non-[gold]Frost[/gold] Orbs.
[gold]Channel[/gold] that many [gold]Frost[/gold] plus 1.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BATTERY_BACKUP.title: Battery Backup
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BATTERY_BACKUP.descrip: Reset your Energy to its max value{IfUpgraded:show: + {Energy:diff()}|}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FISSION.title: Fission
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FISSION.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Evoke|Remove} all your Orbs.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card for each Orb {IfUpgraded:show:Evoked|Removed}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COSMIC_FORM.title: Cosmic Form
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-COSMIC_FORM.descriptio: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)}, draw a card, then discard 1.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CMBR.title: CMBR
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CMBR.description: At the start of each turn, add an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]White Noise[/gold] to your hand.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.title: Eclipse Embrace
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ECLIPSE_EMBRACE.descri: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Void[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card next turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-POWERCYCLE.title: Power Cycle
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SINGLE_MIND.descriptio: If all your Orbs are the same type, gain 1 [gold]Focus[/gold]
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SINGLE_MIND.title: Single Mind
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLACK_ICE.description:
Channel 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
 Your [gold]Dark[/gold] orbs grants {IfUpgraded:2|3} [gold]Block[/gold] at the end of your turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLACK_ICE.title: Black Ice
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TRINVOKE.description: Trigger the passive effects of your Orbs 3 times.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TRINVOKE.title: Trinvoke
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PROCESS.title: Process
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PROCESS.description: Play a card in your draw pile. Shuffle in [gold]Voids[/gold] equal to its cost.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SONG_OF_SORROW.title: Song of Sorrow
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SONG_OF_SORROW.descrip: Whenever you create a [gold]Void[/gold], all enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-EXPANSION.title: Expansion
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INVITATION.title: Invitation
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INVITATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:Status or Curse card|Status or Curse cards} from your [gold]Draw[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INVITATION.selectionSc: Choose a card to take into your hand.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STARBURST.title: Starburst
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ABRA_CADAVER.title: Abra Cadaver
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ABRA_CADAVER.descripti:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for ALL your [purple]Curse[/purple] cards +2.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedStr} [gold]Strength[/gold])|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AVARICE.title: Avarice
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AWAY_WITH_YOU.title: Away With You!
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AWAY_WITH_YOU.descript:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
If you can, remove it from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and lose 5 Max HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BACKHAND.title: Backhand
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BACKHAND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you draw, create, or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [purple]Curse[/purple], put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLAST_FROM_THE_PAST.de: Choose {Cards:diff()} of 5 random cards from your last winning run to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLAST_FROM_THE_PAST.se: Choose {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your last winning run.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONECAGE.title: Bonecage
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONECAGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Gain {LingerBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], then decrease this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 1 this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONE_STORM.title: Bone Storm
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONE_STORM.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONE_VOYAGE.title: Bone Voyage
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BONE_VOYAGE.descriptio:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add {Cards} [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BOO_BUDDIES.title: Boo Buddies
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BOO_BUDDIES.descriptio: The first time you play a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] each turn, play an additional copy of it.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BRAINPHAGE.title: Brainphage
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLANG.title: Clang
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLANG.description:
Can only be played if you have a [purple]Curse[/purple] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLENCH_FIST.title: Clench Fist
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLENCH_FIST.descriptio:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Draw a card next turn
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CONVOKE.title: Convoke
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DARKBLADES.title: Darkblades
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DARKBLADES.description: ALL players add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{Cards:plural:Soul Strike|Soul Strikes}[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEAD_END.title: Dead End
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DISSOCIATE.title: Dissociate
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DOPPELGANGER.title: Doppelganger
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DOPPELGANGER.descripti: Next turn, draw {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} cards and gain {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FINAL_FORM.title: Final Form
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FINAL_FORM.description:
Exhaust 1 card{IfUpgraded:show:| at random}.
At the start of your next 5 turns, play a copy of it.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLICKER_JAB.title: Flicker Jab
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVE_GUARD.title: Grave Guard
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVE_GUARD.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVEYARD_SMASH.title: Graveyard Smash
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVEYARD_SMASH.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards} cards.
Whenever this returns from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold], reduce this card's cost by 1 this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRIMOIRE_OF_SOULS.desc:
Add {Cards:diff()} [purple]Clumsy[/purple] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you play a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold], draw 1 card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRUDGE.title: Grudge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRUDGE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your [purple]Curse[/purple] cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HANDCLAP.title: Handclap
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HANDCLAP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Hits ALL enemies if you have at least {CurseThreshold} [purple]Curses[/purple].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HARVEST.title: Harvest
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HARVEST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - This gains {Increase:diff()} damage, then shuffles into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HAUNTED_HAND.title: Haunted Hand
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-HUBRIS.title: Hubris
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LAMENT.title: Lament
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LAMENT.description:
Strike cards deal {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} more damage this combat.
Add {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LAST_RITES.title: Last Rites
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LAST_RITES.description:
Deal {Damage} damage.
Costs {Energy:energyIcons()} less for ALL of your [purple]Curses[/purple].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOSE_CONTROL.title: Lose Control
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MANIFEST.title: Manifest
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MORE_MORE.title: More, MORE!
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MORE_MORE.description:
After combat, gain an additional card reward.
[gold]Pickup[/gold] - Obtain [purple]Regret[/purple].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NECROMANCY.title: Necromancy
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-NECROMANCY.description: Put ALL [gold]Soul Strikes[/gold] from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Draw Pile|Discard Pile}[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OBLATION.title: Oblation
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OBLATION.description: Transform a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Soul Strike+|Soul Strike}[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OVERTAKE.title: Overtake
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OVERTAKE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Next turn, draw {Cards} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PATIENCE.title: Patience
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PENANCE.title: Penance
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PRIDE.title: Pride
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PURE_AURA.title: Pure Aura
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ZOMBIFICATION.title: Zombification
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ZOMBIFICATION.descript: At the start of your turn, put a random playable card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RELIQUARY_REAVER.title: Reliquary Reaver
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RELIQUARY_REAVER.descr:
Deal {Damage} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], obtain a random {IfUpgraded:show:rare|uncommon} [gold]Relic[/gold] and remove this card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REND_SPIRIT.title: Rend Spirit
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REND_SPIRIT.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RESURRECTION.title: Resurrection
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RESURRECTION.descripti: ALL players add 1 [gold]Graveblast[/gold] into their [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REST_IN_PIECES.title: Rest in Pieces
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REST_IN_PIECES.descrip:
Deal {Damage} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - This hits 2 additional times this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIGHT_CROSS.title: Right Cross
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIGHT_CROSS.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIGOR_MORFIST.title: Rigor Morfist
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIGOR_MORFIST.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Soul Strike[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SERVITUDE.title: Servitude
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SINFUL_STRIKE.title: Sinful Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SMUSH.title: Smush
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SMUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} if you have played a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more this turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPITE.title: Spite
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPITE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and draw {Cards} card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPRAY_N_PRAY.title: Spray n' Pray
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPRAY_N_PRAY.descripti:
Deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
Add a [purple]Doubt[/purple] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TASTY_MORSELS.title: Tasty Morsels
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TASTY_MORSELS.descript:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Whenever an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Plating[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-THE_END_IS_COMING.desc:
The third time this is played, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this.{InCombat:
{PlayCount:choose(3):|(Played {PlayCount}/3 times)}|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TIME_OUT.title: Time Out
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TIME_OUT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If you drew a [purple]Curse[/purple], ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VIOLET_VEIL.title: Violet Veil
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VIOLET_VEIL.descriptio:
At the end of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If it's a [purple]Curse[/purple], gain {VioletVeilPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VOODOO.title: Voodoo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VOODOO.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Pickup[/gold] - Obtain [purple]Normality[/purple].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WORK_OUT.title: Work Out
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WRATH.title: Wrath
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-YOUR_DOOM_IS_NIGH.desc: Whenever you draw a [purple]Curse[/purple], a random enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ANCESTRAL_ECHO.title: Ancestral Echo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ANCESTRAL_ECHO.descrip: Add [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} to the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ANCIENT_THRALL.title: Ancient Thrall
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ANCIENT_THRALL.descrip:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], it must be played before other cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ARMOR_OF_GNEISS.title: Armor of Gneiss
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ASSAULT.title: Assault
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ASSAULT.description: Play any Attacks in the top {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and discard the rest.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AVALANCHE.title: Avalanche
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AVALANCHE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into random [gold]Rocks[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AVALANCHE.selectionScr: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Transform[/gold] into random [gold]Rocks[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BATTLE_SHOUT.title: Battle Shout
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BATTLE_SHOUT.descripti: Increase the damage of ALL Attacks in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BEDROCK.title: Bedrock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BEDROCK.description: At the start of each turn, ALL players gain {BedrockPower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BERSERKING.title: Berserking
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BERSERKING.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLITZ.title: Blitz
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODRAIN.title: Bloodrain
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOODRAIN.description: Apply {BloodbondPower:diff()} [gold]Bloodbond[/gold] to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BORE.title: Bore
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BORE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Small Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLIND_FURY.title: Blind Fury
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLIND_FURY.description:
End your turn.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, and your turn is played by [red]Vakuu[/red].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOOD_LASH.title: Blood Lash
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLOOD_LASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Bloodbond[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BUM_RUSH.title: Bum Rush
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BUM_RUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BUM_RUSH.selectionScre: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALDERA.title: Caldera
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALDERA.selectionScree: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Bomb Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CALDERA.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Bomb Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CARBON_COATING.title: Carbon Coating
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CARBON_COATING.descrip:
Gain [gold]Slate[/gold] equal to the number of Attacks played this turn.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedSlate:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold])|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLAYMAKER.title: Claymaker
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLAYMAKER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If this is played from outside of your [gold]Hand[/gold], add a 0-cost [gold]Shockwave[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEADLANDS_HEX.title: Deadlands Hex
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEADLANDS_HEX.descript:
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] ALL copies of it into [gold]Ghost Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEPOSIT.title: Deposit
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DIG_DEEP.title: Dig Deep
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DIG_DEEP.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
This card cannot be played again this turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DISMEMBER.title: Dismember
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DISMEMBER.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-EARTHBEND.title: Earthbend
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-EARTHBEND.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a random [gold]Rock[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FELDSPAR.title: Feldspar
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-FLAMEFIST.title: Flamefist
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GABBRO.title: Gabbro
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GALACTIC_STRIKE.title: Galactic Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GALACTIC_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into a [gold]Deep Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAPPLE.title: Grapple
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAPPLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you gain [gold]Block[/gold] this turn, deal {GrappleDamage:diff()} damage to the enemy.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVELLIZE.title: Gravellize
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GRAVELLIZE.description:
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card into [gold]Spiked Rock[/gold].
If it was [gold]Unplayable[/gold], add a [gold]Spiked Rock[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-IMMOLATE.title: Immolate
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-IMMOLATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INCITE_VIOLENCE.title: Incite Violence
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INCITE_VIOLENCE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat} times.
The enemy attacks you for {Recoil} damage.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-JAB.title: Jab
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-JAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you play a [gold]Rock[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LET_LOOSE.title: Let Loose
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LET_LOOSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LET_LOOSE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MEGALITH.title: Megalith
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OBSIDIAN.title: Obsidian
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-OBSIDIAN.description:
Your [gold]Slate[/gold] cannot be lowered this turn.{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain {SlatePower} [gold]Slate[/gold].|}
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PAINTED_PETRA.title: Painted Petra
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PAINTED_PETRA.descript:
Gain {SlatePower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold].
Choose 1 card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Tinted Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PEAK_PERFORMANCE.title: Peak Performance
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PEAK_PERFORMANCE.descr:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If this was played from outside of your [gold]Hand[/gold], repeat the effects above {Repeat:diff()} times.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PEBBLEFLINGER.title: Pebbleflinger
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PEBBLEFLINGER.descript: Every 3rd Skill you play, add a [gold]Small Rock[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-POWER_THROUGH.title: Power Through
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PYROCLAST.title: Pyroclast
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PYROCLAST.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and lose HP equal to your [gold]Slate[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LANDSLIDE.title: Landslide
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LANDSLIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUAKE.title: Quake
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into [gold]Rolling Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUARRY.title: Quarry
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-QUARRY.description: Add X+1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Small Rocks+[/gold]|[gold]Small Rocks[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PILLAR_OF_MUTATION.des: Whenever you create a card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REAPER.title: Reaper
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REAPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage dealt.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REVENGE.title: Revenge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-REVENGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Your [gold]Retaliation[/gold] will not be removed at the start of your next turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RIEBECKITE.title: Riebeckite
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RUBBLEROUSER.title: Rubblerouser
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-RUBBLEROUSER.descripti:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL of your Rock cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CHISEL.title: Chisel
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SILTSONG.title: Siltsong
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SONIC_BOOM.title: Sonic Boom
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SONIC_BOOM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLAY_SOLDIER.title: Clay Soldier
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CLAY_SOLDIER.descripti: The first time you lose HP each turn, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} temporary [gold]Strength[/gold] and {SlatePower:diff()} [gold]Slate[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TECTONIC_SHIFT.title: Tectonic Shift
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TECTONIC_SHIFT.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Small Rock+|Small Rock}[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TEMPER.title: Temper
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TEMPER.description: Whenever you play a Skill, gain {RetaliationAmount:diff()} [gold]Retaliation[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TERRA_FIRMA.title: Terra Firma
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TITANIC.title: Titanic
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAMPIRIC_STRIKE.title: Vampiric Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAMPIRIC_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If your HP is at or below 50%, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VITAL_SURGE.title: Vital Surge
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNHOLY_PACT.title: Unholy Pact
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNRELENTING_FORM.title: Unrelenting Form
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-UNRELENTING_FORM.descr: The first time each turn you have no cards in [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAKUUS_MANTLE.title: Vakuu's Mantle
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VAKUUS_MANTLE.descript: At the start of your turn, add a {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Don The Mantle+[/gold]|[gold]Don The Mantle[/gold]} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.title: Volcanic Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transform[/gold] a card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into [gold]Molten Rock[/gold], then put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-VOLCANIC_STRIKE.select: Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Molten Rock[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WARCRAFT.title: Warcraft
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WARCRAFT.description: If you end a turn with at least 15 [gold]Block[/gold], play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-JOLT.title: Jolt
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-JOLT.description: The first time you lose HP each turn, draw {JoltPower:diff()} {JoltPower:plural:card|cards}.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WE_ARE_LEGION.title: We Are Legion
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WE_ARE_LEGION.descript:
Choose an Attack card.
Transform ALL non-Attack cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into copies of it.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WILD_STRIKE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Wound[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WOMBO_COMBO.title: Wombo Combo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-WOMBO_COMBO.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Play a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BOMB_ROCK.title: Bomb Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BOMB_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Reduce this card's cost by 1.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEATHGLARE.title: Deathglare
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEATHGLARE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Linger[/gold] - Add a copy of this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEEP_ROCK.title: Deep Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEEP_ROCK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DON_THE_MANTLE.title: Don The Mantle
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-GHOST_ROCK.title: Ghost Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MADNESS.title: Madness
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MADNESS.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
A random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MOLTEN_ROCK.title: Molten Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-MOLTEN_ROCK.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase the damage of ALL your Rock cards by {GabbroPower:diff()} this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PALE_GAZE.title: Pale Gaze
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ROLLING_ROCK.title: Rolling Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-ROLLING_ROCK.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SMALL_ROCK.title: Small Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SPIKED_ROCK.title: Spiked Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-SOUL_STRIKE.title: Soul Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-TINTED_ROCK.title: Tinted Rock
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STRIKE_CAPTAIN.title: Strike
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEFEND_CAPTAIN.title: Defend
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOAD.title: Load
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STAR_CHARTS.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your hand into your [gold]Cargo[/gold].

INTOTHESPIREVERSE-POWERED_BEAM.descripti: When you draw this, Load {LoadAmmo:diff()} [gold]Ammo[/gold] and gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].

INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PLOT.description:

[gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

|}At the start of your turn, Load 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
